overall.description: A slow first-person walk across a luxury high-rise terrace in a cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves past bamboo planters and lounge furniture toward a glass railing, revealing a sprawling neon-lit metropolis with towering holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise terrace with lounge seating

vertical illuminated advertisement screen displaying MIXIT branding with a female model

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious high-rise terrace at night, with large bamboo planters and modern lounge furniture arranged on polished marble flooring. Bright holographic MIXIT advertisements glow on vertical screens flanking the walkway. The camera moves steadily forward toward a glass railing that overlooks a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape bathed in neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace overlook area with glass railing

events.description: passing a round metal table with a wine glass and digital tablet resting on the surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass railing while moving past terrace furniture and steam vents

entered.detail: tall building covered in massive vertical holographic advertisements including NCPD branding and Japanese text
atmospheric steam or smoke rising from vents near the terrace edge
round metal table holding a wine glass with red liquid and a digital tablet device

segments.scene_description: Moving past the initial terrace area, the bamboo planters fall behind as the camera approaches the glass railing. A table with a wine glass and tablet comes into view and is passed. The massive holographic tower advertisements become prominent in the background, with steam rising from vents near the railing. The city lights glow intensely beyond the transparent barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise balcony edge overlooking neon cityscape

agents.ego_description: standing near the glass railing looking down at the illuminated city streets and towering holographic advertisements below

entered.detail: dark silhouetted skyscrapers with illuminated windows lining the left side of the view

segments.scene_description: Now positioned directly at the glass railing, the camera moves along the terrace edge with an unobstructed view of the cyberpunk city below. The towering NCPD holographic advertisements dominate the right side of the frame, while steam continues to rise from the building's ventilation. The perspective looks down into the illuminated urban canyon, with the glass barrier reflecting the neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a luxury high-rise terrace that transitions from an intimate lounge setting to an expansive overlook of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on polished marble flooring, gliding past large bamboo planters and modern furniture flanked by glowing holographic MIXIT advertisements. As the camera moves forward, the greenery falls away and the view opens up, passing a table with a wine glass and tablet while steam begins to rise from nearby vents. The scene then shifts to a direct position at the glass railing, where the perspective expands to reveal an illuminated urban canyon. Finally, the camera tracks along the terrace edge, with the transparent barrier reflecting the intense city lights and towering NCPD holograms dominating the skyline.
